cases.name: gold
cases.diff:
diff --git a/fmtkit/__init__.py b/fmtkit/__init__.py
index c570759..6b42222 100644
--- a/fmtkit/__init__.py
+++ b/fmtkit/__init__.py
@@ -3,3 +3,15 @@
 
 def comma(n):
     return f"{n:,}"
+
+def format_duration(seconds):
+    h, rem = divmod(seconds, 3600)
+    m, s = divmod(rem, 60)
+    parts = []
+    if h:
+        parts.append(f"{h}h")
+    if m:
+        parts.append(f"{m}m")
+    if s:
+        parts.append(f"{s}s")
+    return " ".join(parts) if parts else "0s"

cases.name: always_all_parts
cases.diff:
diff --git a/fmtkit/__init__.py b/fmtkit/__init__.py
index c570759..7679527 100644
--- a/fmtkit/__init__.py
+++ b/fmtkit/__init__.py
@@ -3,3 +3,8 @@
 
 def comma(n):
     return f"{n:,}"
+
+def format_duration(seconds):
+    h, rem = divmod(seconds, 3600)
+    m, s = divmod(rem, 60)
+    return f"{h}h {m}m {s}s"
